title: An MP eva concept
wikitext:
[]: An MP eva concept?             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Fri Aug 11, 2006 8:37 am What IS this?! Whatever it is, I think it's only a concept for something.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Fri Aug 11, 2006 8:47 am That should be an Angel?

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Fri Aug 11, 2006 8:49 am DUDE, WHERE DO YOU GET THOSE PICS!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 11, 2006 9:17 am That's the "Diemay Angel". Plug it into Google for quick and easy results.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Aug 11, 2006 9:31 am I'm surprised how often this image comes up.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri Aug 11, 2006 11:34 am It does look a little like a mutated Production Model Eva. Might have made the UBF a little more interesting if it were.

[]:             Quote Post by Ripple_in_Eternity » Fri Aug 11, 2006 1:46 pm I thought that was just the winner of a contest for angel design.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 11, 2006 3:36 pm Ripple_in_Eternity wrote: I thought that was just the winner of a contest for angel design.

[]:             Quote Post by Israfel777 » Fri Aug 11, 2006 10:29 pm Reichu wrote: Ripple_in_Eternity wrote: I thought that was just the winner of a contest for angel design.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 11, 2006 10:53 pm If you do not know what the Diemay Angel is and/or the story behind it, CLICK ON THIS LINK. NOW.

[]:             Quote Post by dogmai » Sun Aug 13, 2006 4:00 am oh, so that's what that thing is i've seen that so many times on google while looking up eva pics

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Sun Aug 13, 2006 4:15 am Man, the picture IS old!! But I never know it was from some contest?! Thought it was from some Evangelion video-game!

[]:             Quote Post by Ripple_in_Eternity » Mon Aug 14, 2006 12:59 am [deleted by user]

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon Aug 14, 2006 1:31 am "Deutron Rifles"

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Aug 14, 2006 7:12 pm Some think its what Arael looks like when hes not all glowy lookin. I agree with Reichu though.

[]:             Quote Post by the3rdchildren » Mon Aug 14, 2006 9:03 pm I remember having an argument with a kid in a chat room who called that Angel "Humanis" or the final Angel or something like that. Those were some good times.
summary:
[]: An MP eva concept?             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Fri Aug 11, 2006 8:37 am What IS this?! Whatever it is, I think it's only a concept for something.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Fri Aug 11, 2006 8:47 am That should be an Angel?

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Fri Aug 11, 2006 8:49 am D
